poi_runes.name: Golden Rune (12) A - x1 - Crumbling Farum Azula
Golden Rune (10) - x1 Ordina, Liturgical Town
Golden Rune [10] - Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree
Numen's Rune - Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree
Golden Rune [12] - Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree
Hero's Rune [5] - Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree

Numen's Rune - Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree

Golden Rune (7) - x1 - Cave of Forlorn
Golden Rune [13] - Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree

Golden Rune (4) - x2 - Raya Lucaria Academy (D)
Golden Rune (6) - x2 - Nokron, Eternal City

Kill Godrick while summoning Nepheli Lou.notes: Nepheli Loux summon sign outside Godrick's fog gate. Kill Margit first to access Stormveil. Godrick has higher HP when Nepheli is summoned.

Kill Rennala after she summons 4 spirits.boss_search: Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon

locations.name: Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon

remembrance.name: Remembrance of the Full Moon Queen

Kill Rennala after she summons 4 spirits.notes: Requires Academy Glintstone Key and defeating Red Wolf of Radagon. Phase 1: wait for Rennala to summon exactly 4 spirits before breaking her shield.

Kill Radahn without summoning NPCs.notes: Radahn Festival is triggered by resting at an Altus Plateau grace (the S6 starting grace at Altus Highway Junction does NOT trigger it — you must physically reach and rest at another Altus grace). Do not interact with any summon signs at the battlefield.

Kill Morgott.notes: Must defeat Godfrey's Golden Shade first (east of the Erdtree in Leyndell). Capital access requires: 2 Great Runes OR Fia's Champions quest.

Kill an Ancestor Spirit.notes: Ancestor Spirit (Siofra River) — no prerequisites. Regal Ancestor Spirit (Nokron) — requires Radahn dead (nokron_access) AND killing Mimic Tear in Nokron.

Kill Mohg, Lord of Blood.notes: Access via Varre's quest (Pureblood Knight's Medal) OR Consecrated Snowfield waygate (requires left Haligtree medallion half). Surface entry point: Waygate at Consecrated Snowfield (x: -70.68, y: 129.59).

Kill Margit with 6+ parries.notes: Must land 6+ successful parries before killing. Use a parry shield or Carian Retaliation. Margit has specific parryable windows.

Kill a Red Wolf Boss.notes: Red Wolf of Radagon (Raya Lucaria) or Red Wolf of the Champion (Gelmir Hero's Grave). Raya Lucaria is more accessible early.

Kill Godskin Noble (Volcano Manor) witho.notes: Must not apply Bleed, Frost, Poison, Scarlet Rot, Sleep, or Madness. Pure physical or Holy/Fire damage only.

Kill a Godskin Apostle.notes: Caelid: Divine Tower of Caelid basement (accessible from Dragonbarrow). Altus Plateau: Windmill Village (field boss, no dungeon). Spiritcaller Cave summons do NOT count — those are phantoms from the snail boss.

Kill Godfrey (Gold Spirit).notes: Gold phantom in Leyndell Royal Capital. Not the real Godfrey. Accessible via Leyndell once Morgott is reachable. Capital access requires: 2 Great Runes (defeat 2 shardbearers) OR complete Fia's Champions quest.

Kill Mimic Tear consumables only.notes: Two options: Stray Mimic Tear (Mountaintops of the Giants — no prerequisites) or Mimic Tear in Nokron (requires Radahn dead to open crater). Unequip all weapons/armor/spells before entering fog gate — Mimic copies your loadout at entry. Use consumables only (pots, arrows, grease) after entering.

Kill Valiant Gargoyles.notes: Duo boss in Nokron. Both gargoyles must die.

Kill Fia's Champions.notes: Deeproot Depths (via Siofra Aqueduct after killing Valiant Gargoyles). Does NOT require giving Cursemark of Death to Fia (that is needed for Fortissax). One of the hardest NPC boss fights in the game.

Kill Mohg (Sewers).notes: Subterranean Shunning-Grounds under Leyndell. Access via well in Leyndell streets. Capital access requires: 2 Great Runes (defeat 2 shardbearers) OR complete Fia's Champions quest.

Kill Loretta (Blue Spirit).notes: Caria Manor. Not the Haligtree Loretta — this is the blue spirit version.

Kill Commander O'Neil.notes: In Aeonia Swamp, Caelid. Caelid starting grace is nearby.

locations.name: Grafted Scion (Fringefolk Hero's Grave)
locations.notes: First fog gate of Fringefolk Hero's Grave (Stranded Graveyard).

locations.name: Grafted Scion (Chapel of Anticipation, via Four Belfries)
locations.notes: Access via the top-most waygate at the Four Belfries in Liurnia. Counts as Liurnia kill.

locations.name: Grafted Scion (Mt. Gelmir)
locations.notes: On the rocky terrain of Mt. Gelmir.

Kill %num% Grafted Scions.notes: Locations: Fringefolk Hero's Grave (first fog gate), Chapel of Anticipation (via Four Belfries — counts as Liurnia), Stormveil Castle, Liurnia of the Lakes (wandering), Mt. Gelmir.

Kill Soldier of Godrick bare fist only.notes: Tutorial boss. Unequip all weapons before fog gate. Punch only.

Kill Limgrave Tree Sentinel with a +0 we.notes: The overworld Tree Sentinel on the road from First Step. Must use a completely unupgraded (+0) weapon.

Kill Agheel with a +0 weapon only.notes: Dragon-Burnt Ruins, Limgrave. Must use a +0 weapon throughout the fight.

Kill Tree Sentinel duo.notes: Two Tree Sentinels guarding Leyndell main gate. Both count as 1 horse boss toward that square, not 2.

Kill Crucible Knight and Misbegotten War.notes: Redmane Castle, Caelid. Accessible from Caelid starting grace.

Kill Putrid Crystalian trio.notes: Sellia Hideaway, Caelid. All 3 Crystalians must die.

Kill Wormface.notes: Altus Plateau, near the Erdtree. Accessible from Altus starting grace.

Kill Bloodhound Knight while summoning B.notes: Forlorn Hound Evergaol, Limgrave. Must use Blaidd's summon sign outside the evergaol. Requires starting Blaidd's quest (talk to him at Mistwood after using finger snap gesture).

Kill Greyoll without status effects.notes: Dragonbarrow, Caelid. Do not apply Bleed, Rot, Frost, Poison etc. Physical damage only. Accessible from Caelid starting grace.

Kill 4 Bosses with the word God in it.description: Kill 4 bosses with "God" in their name

candidates.name: Godfrey, First Elden Lord (Golden Shade)
candidates.notes: Gold phantom in Leyndell. Requires capital access. Must kill before Morgott.

Kill 4 Bosses with the word God in it.notes: Candidates: Godrick, Godfrey (Gold Shade), Godfrey (Real/Hoarah Loux), Godefroy, God-Devouring Serpent/Rykard, Godskin Apostle, Godskin Noble (Volcano Manor only — Divine Tower of Liurnia version is NOT a boss), Godskin Duo, Soldier of Godrick. Pick any 4.

Kill a Dragonkin Soldier.notes: Three instances: Siofra River (level 2, no prereq), Nokstella (level 2, needs Ainsel access), Lake of Rot (level 2, needs Ainsel/Ranni). Siofra is most accessible.

Kill a Magma Wyrm boss.notes: Gael Tunnel (Caelid border, easiest), Magma Wyrm Makar (Ruin-Strewn Precipice, drops Moonveil), Magma Wyrm (Volcano Manor area), Magma Wyrm (Mt. Gelmir lava pool, Seethewater Terminus), Great Wyrm Theodorix (Consecrated Snowfield). Note: Great Wyrm Theodorix is NOT in the Magma Wyrm square — it is in Dragon Hearts.

Kill a Fallingstar Beast.notes: Sellia Crystal Tunnel (Caelid), Altus Plateau tunnel, Full-Grown version at Mt. Gelmir. Caelid tunnel is most accessible from starting grace.

Kill a Black Blade Kindred.notes: Two instances: Bestial Sanctum (Caelid/Dragonbarrow, teleport from Limgrave) and Forbidden Lands (pre-Mountaintops). Bestial Sanctum is accessible extremely early via portal.

Kill %numofbosses% Omenkiller boss.notes: Village of the Albinaurics (Liurnia), Volcano Manor (paired with Miranda), Perfumer's Grotto (Altus).

locations.name: Death Rite Bird (Central Mountaintops of the Giants)
Death Rite Bird (Raya Lucaria Academy East)
Death Rite Bird (West Mountaintops of the Giants)

Kill 2 Deathbirds and 1 Death Rite Bird.notes: Deathbirds are daytime, Death Rite Birds are night-only. Plan accordingly.

Kill %numofbosses% Watchdogs.notes: Found in most catacombs. Stormfoot, Impaler's, Minor Erdtree, Wyndham, Cliffbottom.

Kill %numofbosses%.notes: Grave Warden Duelists (Limgrave/Auriza catacombs), Frenzied Duelist (Gaol Cave), Putrid Grave Warden Duelist (Consecrated Snowfield).

locations.name: Black Knife Assassin (Liurnia of the Lakes East)
Crucible Knight (Stormveil Castle)
locations.notes: In a room near the grafted scion in Stormveil. Not a dungeon boss but still counts.

locations.name: Crucible Knight (Nokron, before Gargoyles)
locations.notes: Two Crucible Knights before the Valiant Gargoyle fog gate in Nokron. Both count individually.

Kill %numofbosses% Crucible Knights.notes: Stormhill Evergaol (Crucible Knight, Limgrave), Stormveil Castle (Crucible Knight), Auriza Hero's Grave (Ordovis duo, Leyndell), Redmane Castle (Misbegotten duo, Caelid), Nokron 2x (before Valiant Gargoyles, needs Radahn), Deeproot Depths (Siluria).

locations.name: Glintstone Dragon Adula (Cathedral of Manus Celes)
locations.notes: Glintstone Dragon Adula flees after ~30% HP at Three Sisters; must finish at Cathedral of Manus Celes. Requires killing Astel, Naturalborn of the Void to unlock Moonlight Altar.

locations.name: Glintstone Dragon Adula (Three Sisters)
locations.notes: Glintstone Dragon Adula flees after ~30% HP at Three Sisters; must finish at Cathedral of Manus Celes. Requires killing Astel, Naturalborn of the Void to unlock Moonlight Altar.

locations.name: Dragonlord Placidusax
locations.notes: Requires: lie down at the coffin in Crumbling Farum Azula (Beside the Great Bridge area).

locations.name: Lichdragon Fortissax
locations.notes: Requires: Fia quest (give Cursemark of Death to Fia at Deeproot Depths).

Kill %numofbosses% Dragon Heart bosses.notes: Any boss that drops a Dragon Heart. Includes all field dragons and dragon bosses. Agheel (Limgrave) and Smarag (Liurnia) are among the earliest.

candidates.name: Dragonlord Placidusax
candidates.notes: Requires: lie down at the coffin in Crumbling Farum Azula (Beside the Great Bridge area).

candidates.name: Glintstone Dragon Adula (Cathedral of Manus Celes)
candidates.notes: Glintstone Dragon Adula flees after ~30% HP at Three Sisters; must finish at Cathedral of Manus Celes. Requires killing Astel, Naturalborn of the Void to unlock Moonlight Altar.

candidates.name: Glintstone Dragon Adula (Three Sisters)
candidates.notes: Glintstone Dragon Adula flees after ~30% HP at Three Sisters; must finish at Cathedral of Manus Celes. Requires killing Astel, Naturalborn of the Void to unlock Moonlight Altar.

Kill %numofbosses% Erdtree Avatars.notes: One at each Minor Erdtree. Weeping Peninsula is the closest from start.

locations.name: Night's Cavalry (Liurnia of the Lakes North)

Kill %numofbosses% Night's Cavalry.notes: Night-only bosses. Multiple in Limgrave, Liurnia, Caelid, Altus, Mountaintops. Limgrave and Weeping Peninsula instances are earliest.

Kill %numofbosses% Tibia Mariners.notes: Limgrave (Summonwater Village), Liurnia, Wyndham Ruins (Altus). All accessible from starting graces.

Kill %numofbosses% Bell Bearing Hunters.notes: Night-only. Spawn at merchant locations after killing the merchant or at night. Warmaster's Shack (Limgrave) is earliest.

Kill 3 duo/trio bosses.description: Kill 3 encounters that are duo or trio fights

candidates.name: Fell Twins
candidates.notes: Behind Divine Tower Bridge in Leyndell. Requires Morgott dead and capital access.

candidates.name: Godskin Duo
candidates.notes: Crumbling Farum Azula. Requires Fire Giant dead to progress.

candidates.name: Valiant Gargoyle
candidates.notes: Siofra Aqueduct (Nokron access required via Radahn).

candidates.name: Misbegotten Warrior & Crucible Knight (Redmane Castle)
candidates.notes: Redmane Castle, Caelid. Available once Radahn Festival is triggered.

candidates.name: Omenkiller & Miranda the Blighted Bloom (Perfumer's Grotto)
Beastman of Farum Azula Duo (Dragonbarrow Cave)

Kill 3 duo/trio bosses.notes: Fell Twins (Leyndell, needs Morgott + capital access), Nox Swordstress & Nox Priest (Sellia), Crucible Knight & Ordovis (Leyndell), Godskin Duo (Farum Azula, needs Fire Giant dead), Crystalian Trio (Sellia Hideaway), Cleanrot Knight Duo (Abandoned Cave), Valiant Gargoyles (Nokron, needs Radahn), Misbegotten Warrior + Crucible Knight (Redmane), Miranda + Omenkiller (Perfumer's Grotto), Abductor Virgin Duo (Volcano Manor), Beastman Duo (Dragonbarrow Cave).

Kill 5 bosses that ride a horse.description: Kill 5 bosses that ride a horse

candidates.name: Night's Cavalry (Liurnia of the Lakes North)

Kill 5 bosses that ride a horse.notes: Night's Cavalry (multiple locations, night only), Tree Sentinel (Limgrave, Leyndell gate), Tree Sentinel Duo (Leyndell gate — counts as 2), Draconic Tree Sentinel (Altus — counts), Starscourge Radahn, Commander O'Neil. Commander Niall does NOT ride a horse. Farum Azula Draconic Tree Sentinel is NOT a boss.

Kill 5 bosses with 'tree' in their name.description: Kill 5 bosses with 'tree' in their name
Kill 5 bosses with 'tree' in their name.notes: Tree Sentinel (x2 locations + Leyndell duo), Draconic Tree Sentinel (x2), Ulcerated Tree Spirit (x3), Putrid Tree Spirit, Erdtree Avatar (x6+), Erdtree Burial Watchdog (x5).

Kill a Remembrance boss hitless.notes: No build requirement. Attach to easiest remembrance boss on your route. Margit or Godrick recommended for beginners. Hitless = take zero damage for the entire fight.

Kill a Remembrance boss colossal armamen.notes: Must use only colossal weapons (Greatsword class, Colossal Sword class, Colossal Weapon class). S6 drop mechanic means you can get one upgraded immediately.

Kill a Remembrance boss daggers, claws,.notes: Daggers, Claws, or Fists only. Reduvia (Limgrave invasion) or any starting dagger. Upgrade via drop mechanic.

Kill a Remembrance boss bow only.notes: Bow + arrows only. Stock up on arrows beforehand. Slower fight — pick a remembrance boss you know well.

Kill a Remembrance boss sorcery only.notes: Randomized sorceries may or may not be good. Dragon school sorceries (Caelid, dragon hearts) are always available. Staff from S6 randomization or Waypoint Ruins (Glintstone Staff).

Kill a Remembrance boss incantations onl.notes: Seal given by S6 rules. Dragon Communion incants (Caelid church) available early. Randomized incants may vary.

build_req.prerequisite: must kill one remembrance boss first, exchange at Roundtable

Kill a Remembrance boss w/ remembrance w.notes: Exchange a Remembrance with Enia at Roundtable Hold to obtain a remembrance weapon. Must kill a remembrance boss first to have a Remembrance to exchange.

Finish off a boss with the explosive phy.notes: Requires Flask of Wondrous Physick (Third Church of Marika, Limgrave) and Ruptured Crystal Tear (Erdtree Avatar, Liurnia SW Minor Erdtree). Mix the physick and deal the killing blow using the explosion — works on any boss.

Kill %numofbosses% bosses in Limgrave.notes: Kill the required number of bosses in Limgrave.

Kill %numofbosses% bosses in Liurnia.notes: Kill the required number of bosses in Liurnia.

Kill %numofbosses% bosses in Caelid.notes: Kill the required number of bosses in Caelid.

Kill %numofbosses% bosses in Altus Plate.notes: Kill the required number of bosses in Altus Plateau and Mt. Gelmir.

locations.name: Black Knife Assassin (Liurnia of the Lakes East)

Complete %num% catacomb dungeons.notes: Complete catacomb dungeons by killing the final boss.

Complete %num% cave or grotto dungeons.notes: Complete cave or grotto dungeons by killing the final boss.

Complete %num% tunnel or precipice dunge.notes: Tunnels and Precipices contain smithing stones — very important for upgrades. Bosses: Limgrave Tunnels (Stonedigger Troll), Morne Tunnel (Scaly Misbegotten), Raya Lucaria Crystal Tunnel (Crystalian), Gael Tunnel (Magma Wyrm), Sellia Crystal Tunnel (Fallingstar Beast), Old Altus Tunnel (Stonedigger Troll), Altus Tunnel (Crystalian Duo), Ruin-Strewn Precipice (Magma Wyrm Makar), Sealed Tunnel (Onyx Lord), Yelough Anix Tunnel (Astel Stars of Darkness).

Complete an Altus Plateau Hero's Grave.notes: Complete the Auriza Hero's Grave or Gelmir Hero's Grave on the Altus Plateau.

locations.name: Alecto, Black Knife Ringleader
locations.notes: Ringleader's Evergaol (Moonlight Altar). Requires killing Astel, Naturalborn of the Void to unlock Moonlight Altar area.

Complete %num% evergaols.notes: Complete evergaol encounters by defeating the trapped boss.

Kill Fire Giant.notes: Fire Giant is at the top of the Mountaintops of the Giants near the Forge of the Giants.

Acquire Somberstone Bell Bearing [1] and.notes: Both Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearings needed. [1] from Mohgwyn Palace area, [2] from Mountaintops.

Acquire Smithing-stone Bell Bearing [1].notes: Both Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearings needed.

locations.name: Ghost-Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing (1)
locations.notes: Found in Siofra River / Nokron area. Requires Radahn dead for nokron_access.

Acquire Grave and Ghost Glovewort Bell B.notes: Glovewort (1) from Wyndham Catacombs area (Altus). Ghost-Glovewort (1) from Siofra River Bank (requires Nokron access).
Ghost-Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing (2) from Ainsel River Main.

locations.name: Margit's Shackle (Patches - Murkwater Cave)
locations.notes: Buy from Patches in Murkwater Cave after sparing him.

locations.name: Mohg's Shackle (Leyndell Sewers)
locations.notes: Found in the Leyndell Royal Capital sewers. Requires capital access.

Acquire Margit's and Mohg's Shackles.notes: Margit's Shackle: Patches at Murkwater Cave (buy after sparing him). Mohg's Shackle: Leyndell sewers (requires capital access).

Restore Godrick's Great Rune.notes: Restore at Divine Tower of Limgrave.

Restore Radahn's Great Rune.notes: Restore at Divine Tower of Caelid.

locations.name: Divine Tower of West Altus Gate

Restore Rykard's Great Rune.notes: Kill Rykard, then defeat Onyx Lord in the Sealed Tunnel (west Altus Plateau) to unlock the Divine Tower of West Altus gate. Restore at the tower.

Restore Morgott's Great Rune.notes: Restore at Divine Tower of East Altus. Fell Twins guard the Grand Lift of Rold to the tower.

Spirit Ash +4 summon.notes: Upgrade any Spirit Ash to +4. Requires Grave Glovewort [4] and Ghost Glovewort [4].

locations.name: Golden Seed - Minor Erdtree Altus Plateau
Golden Seed - Liurnia of the Lakes

Sacred Flask + %num%.notes: Collect Golden Seeds to add Flask uses. Collect Sacred Tears to improve Flask effectiveness.

locations.name: Golden Seed - Minor Erdtree Altus Plateau
Golden Seed - Liurnia of the Lakes

10 Sacred Flask charges.notes: Reach 10 total Sacred Flask charges (combines Golden Seeds + Sacred Tears).

locations.name: Cracked Pot - x2 - Auriza Side Tomb

Acquire 10 Cracked Pots.notes: Collect 10 Cracked Pots from world locations and merchants.

Acquire 5 Ritual Pots.notes: Collect 5 Ritual Pots. Found at Laskyar Ruins, Raya Lucaria, and Jarburg.

locations.name: Radagon's Scarseal
locations.notes: On a corpse near the Dragonkin Soldier in Siofra River (underground).

Acquire both Scarseal talismans.notes: Radagon's Scarseal: Siofra River (underground, near Dragonkin Soldier — no prerequisites). Marika's Scarseal: Nokron, Eternal City (requires Radahn dead for nokron_access).

prerequisites: Talk to Rya at Laskyar Ruins
Take Rya's hand to Volcano Manor.notes: Talk to Rya at Laskyar Ruins in Liurnia after returning her necklace. She will offer to teleport you to Volcano Manor.

Return Thop's academy key.notes: Give a spare Academy Glintstone Key to Thops at Church of Irith. The spare key is found in Raya Lucaria Academy (after killing Red Wolf of Radagon).

Acquire Fingerslayer Blade.notes: Found in a chest in Nokron, Eternal City (near the Night's Sacred Ground). Requires killing Radahn and starting Ranni's quest.

Invade and defeat Magnus the Beast Claw.notes: Magnus the Beast Claw invades at Writheblood Ruins on Altus Plateau. No questline prerequisites needed.

Dupe a Remembrance at a Mausoleum.notes: Stop a Walking Mausoleum by hitting the white skulls on its legs, then interact to duplicate a Remembrance. Crownless mausoleums cannot duplicate boss remembrances.

Memory of Grace with 50k+ Runes.notes: Use a Memory of Grace consumable while carrying 50,000 or more runes.

Kill 4 NPC invaders.notes: Kill 4 NPC red phantom invaders encountered throughout the world.

locations.name: Bloody Finger Hunter Yura (Murkwater Cave area)
locations.notes: Yura can be found near Murkwater Cave and later near the Raya Lucaria Main Academy Gate.

locations.name: Blaidd (Mistwood Ruins / Ranni's Rise)
locations.notes: Blaidd is found near Ranni's Rise after completing Ranni's quest or killing him there. Check if Rya/Boggart kill-lock applies before selecting.

Kill 3 friendly NPCs (no hermit merchant.notes: Kill 3 friendly NPCs (not hermit merchants). Options include: Varre, Boc, Miriel, Yura, Blaidd, Iji, Millicent, Rogier, D, Nepheli, Rya, Boggart. Note: Roderika is unkillable. If squares exist for Rya or Boggart interactions, do NOT kill them before completing those squares.

Kill Gurranq.notes: Kill Gurranq at the Bestial Sanctum in Dragonbarrow. Accessible via a Sending Gate near the Third Church of Marika.

prerequisites: Acquire Ash of War: Lightning Ram
Use AoW Lightning Ram to kill 10 sheep.notes: Equip Lightning Ram Ash of War, then charge into the large sheep herd on Stormhill to kill 10 at once.

Learn 12 different sorceries.notes: Learn 12 unique sorceries. Available from vendors, spell items, and throughout the world.

Learn 14 different incantations.notes: Learn 14 unique incantations. Available from vendors, dragon communion, and throughout the world.

30 Faith (no rebirth or buffs).notes: Reach 30 Faith without Rebirth or temporary buffs.

30 Arcane (no rebirth or buffs).notes: Reach 30 Arcane without Rebirth or temporary buffs.

30 Int (no rebirth or buffs).notes: Reach 30 Int without Rebirth or temporary buffs.

Kill Lansseax.notes: Ancient Dragon Lansseax at Rampartside Path, Altus Plateau. The other encounter (near Ruin-Strewn Precipice) has Lansseax fly away — does not count. Kill at Rampartside Path only.

prerequisites: Find Shabriri Grapes (dropped by Fingerprint enemies, or Festering Bloody Fingers)
Give Hyetta 3 Shabriri Grapes.notes: Give Shabriri Grapes to Hyetta at three different locations in Liurnia. She progressively moves eastward. Grapes are found on corpses: one near Gate Town Bridge (Liurnia), one near the Church of Irith (Limgrave/Liurnia border), one at the Frenzied Flame Village Outskirts (Liurnia north).

locations.name: Ulcerated Tree Spirit (Fringefolk Hero's Grave)
locations.notes: Inside Fringefolk Hero's Grave, Stranded Graveyard.

locations.name: Ulcerated Tree Spirit (Deeproot Depths)
locations.notes: Deeproot Depths — requires Valiant Gargoyles killed.

Kill 3 Tree spirits.notes: Includes any Ulcerated or Putrid Tree Spirit, boss or otherwise. Non-boss instances (Fringefolk, Deeproot) also count.

Collect 6 unique Staves.notes: Collect 6 unique Staves (sorcery catalysts) from across the world.

Collect 3 Painting rewards.notes: Find 3 painting vista rewards by locating the scenes depicted in paintings across the world.

locations.name: Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right)
locations.notes: Given by Albus (disguised as jar) at Village of the Albinaurics, Liurnia. No prerequisites.

locations.name: Haligtree Secret Medallion (Left)
locations.notes: Castle Sol, Mountaintops of the Giants. Requires killing Commander Niall.

prerequisites: Kill Commander Niall for left half
Collect the full Haligtree Medallion.notes: Right half: Village of the Albinaurics, Liurnia (no prereqs). Left half: Castle Sol, Mountaintops — requires killing Commander Niall.

Kill Malenia.notes: Malenia is in Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree. Requires the full Haligtree Medallion to access.

Kill Borealis.notes: Borealis patrols the Freezing Lake in the Mountaintops of the Giants.

bosses.name: Astel, Naturalborn of the Void
bosses.notes: Ainsel River Main / Grand Cloister. Lake of Rot Shoreside grace is S6 starting grace — no Ranni quest needed.

Kill Astel and Astel, Stars of Darkness.notes: Both Astels must be killed. Naturalborn is in the Grand Cloister (requires Ranni quest). Stars of Darkness is in Yelough Anix Tunnel, Consecrated Snowfield.

locations.name: Patches (Murkwater Cave)
locations.notes: Fight Patches after he ambushes you in Murkwater Cave. Spare him after to access his shop.

locations.name: Mimic Tear (Nokron)
locations.notes: Nokron, Eternal City. Requires Radahn dead (nokron_access). Unequip all gear before fog gate.

locations.name: Stray Mimic Tear (Hidden Path to the Haligtree)
locations.notes: Hidden Path to the Haligtree, Consecrated Snowfield area.

locations.name: Roundtable Knight Vyke (Volcano Manor)
locations.notes: Lurnia of the Lakes adjacent (via Volcano Manor quest). Accessible via Ryke's questline.

locations.name: Esgar, Priest of Blood (Leyndell Sewers)
locations.notes: Leyndell Royal Capital sewers. Requires capital access.

locations.name: Bell-Bearing Hunter (Warmaster's Shack)
locations.notes: Appears at night at Warmaster's Shack, Limgrave.

Kill 4 NPC Bosses.notes: NPC bosses include: Patches (Murkwater Cave), Mimic Tear (Nokron), Stray Mimic Tear (Consecrated Snowfield), Roundtable Knight Vyke, Esgar Priest of Blood (Leyndell sewers, needs capital access), Bell-Bearing Hunters.

Kill Misbegotten Crusader.notes: Misbegotten Crusader is in Cave of the Forlorn (Consecrated Snowfield). Requires full Haligtree Medallion.

Acquire Moon of Nokstella.notes: Moon of Nokstella is in Ainsel River Main, close to the Lake of Rot Shoreside grace (an S6 starting grace). No prerequisites needed — short run from the grace.

Kill Roundtable Knight Vyke.notes: Roundtable Knight Vyke is trapped in the Lord Contender's Evergaol in the Mountaintops of the Giants. Accessible from S6 Snow Valley starting grace.

prerequisites: Rescue Rya's necklace from Blackguard at Stormhill Shack to trigger his move to Liurnia
Buy 20 Boiled Crab from Boggart.notes: Blackguard Big Boggart moves to Boilprawn Shack in Liurnia after his necklace subplot. Buy 20 Boiled Crab total.

locations.name: Lion Guardian (Stormveil Castle)
locations.notes: In the main courtyard area of Stormveil Castle.

locations.name: Lion Guardian (Farum Azula - Dragon Temple)
locations.notes: Found in Crumbling Farum Azula near the Dragon Temple.

locations.name: Lion Guardian (Farum Azula - Altar)
locations.notes: Second Lion Guardian in Farum Azula.

Kill 2 Elder Lions.notes: Lion Guardians (Elder Lions) are found in Stormveil Castle and Crumbling Farum Azula.

Kill the Sleeping Golem in Leyndell.notes: Kill the Giant Golem (the sleeping giant golem) in Leyndell, Royal Capital. Accessible via trap chest teleporter in Weeping Peninsula (no capital_access needed).

Collect %num% unique Seals.notes: Collect unique Sacred Seals (incantation catalysts) from across the world.

Kill the Millicent invader in Caelid.notes: Millicent invades in the Aeonia Swamp area of Caelid, near the Heart of Aeonia. No prerequisites needed.

Acquire 9 different Talismans (only 1 Sa.notes: Collect 9 unique Talismans. Only 1 Sacrificial Twig counts toward the goal.
